title: Americans have become more likely to say Trump is not too or not at all religious
summary_en: Among Trump’s strongest supporters, relatively few people say they think he is very religious. Just 8% of Republicans and 5% of White evangelicals say this is the case.
title_cn: [待翻译] Americans have become more likely to say Trump is not too or not at all religious

title: Americans stand out internationally for their pessimism about the nation’s political system
summary_en: People in higher-income countries are generally less likely to say their nation’s political system needs major changes or complete reform. Americans are an exception.
title_cn: [待翻译] Americans stand out internationally for their pessimism about the nation’s political system

title: Teens’ Experiences on TikTok, Instagram and Snapchat
summary_en: Teens largely turn to TikTok, Instagram and Snapchat for fun and connection. But experiences around messaging, screen time and cyberbullying vary. And what teens say about how these sites impact their mental health.
title_cn: [待翻译] Teens’ Experiences on TikTok, Instagram and Snapchat

title: Multiple indicators show a decline in the health of America’s democracy in 2025
summary_en: Most Americans say democracy in the United States used to be a good example for other countries to follow but has not been in recent years.
title_cn: [待翻译] Multiple indicators show a decline in the health of America’s democracy in 2025
